zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshire於大約1203年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特金斯頓 羅素時，他的父親Sir John Russell25歲，母親Lady Rohese de Bardolf25歲。他於1224年與Isabella de Newmarch結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshire于大约1203年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特金斯頓 羅素时，他的父亲Sir John Russell25岁，母亲Lady Rohese de Bardolf25岁。他于1224年与Isabella de Newmarch结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Russell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: of Norman origin, from Old French and Anglo-Norman French r(o)ussel, a diminutive of Old French rous(e) ‘red, reddish’, used either as a nickname for someone with red hair or a ruddy complexion, or as a personal name. Compare Rouse . This Norman name has been established in Ireland since the 12th century. It has been reinforced in Britain and Ireland by Huguenot bearers of the name Roussel, of the same Old French origin.

English: habitational name from any of several places called Rushall (Norfolk, Staffordshire, Wiltshire) or possibly sometimes from Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent). Rushall in Staffordshire derives from Old English rysc ‘rush, rushes’ + halh ‘nook, corner of land’. Rushall in Norfolk derives from an uncertain first element + Old English halh. Rushall in Wiltshire derives from an Old English personal name Rust (genitive Rustes) + halh. Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent) probably derives from Old English rust ‘rust, rust color’ + wella ‘well, spring, stream’, but with a change in the final element due to influence from Middle English, Old English hall ‘hall, residence’, perhaps referring to a nearby building.
Americanized form of German Rüssel, from a pet form of any of various personal names formed with the element hrōd ‘fame, renown’.

variants.name: Russler
meanings: occupational name for a farmer, from an agent derivative of rüsseln ‘to shallow plow’.

variants.name: Rouse
meanings: English: nickname for a person with red hair or a ruddy complexion, from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French rous(e) ‘red(-haired)’ (from Latin russ(e)us).
Walloon and northern French (Rousé): variant of Rosé (see Rose ).

variants.name: Russel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Russell  .
German: from a pet form of Russ, see Russ 2.
northwest German (Rüssel): probably a variant of Rossel .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshire was born about 1203, in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Russell, was 25 and his mother, Lady Rohese de Bardolf, was 25. He married Isabella de Newmarch in 1224. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshire est né environ 1203, à Kingston Russell, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Russell, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Rohese de Bardolf, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Isabella de Newmarch en 1224. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshire um 1203 in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Russell 25 und seine Mutter Lady Rohese de Bardolf 25. Er hat 1224 Isabella de Newmarch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshire è nato il circa 1203 nel Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Russell, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lady Rohese de Bardolf, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Isabella de Newmarch nel 1224. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshireが約1203年にイギリスイギリスドールセトキングストン ルセルで生まれた時，父Sir John Russellは25歳，母Lady Rohese de Bardolfは25歳であった。1224年にIsabella de Newmarchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshire(이)가 대략 1203년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 킨그스턴 러셀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Russell(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Rohese de Bardolf(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1224년 Isabella de Newmarch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshire nasceu aproximadamente 1203, em Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Russell, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Rohese de Bardolf, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella de Newmarch em 1224. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Russell Sheriff of Wiltshire родился около 1203 г. в местности кингстон расселл, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Russell было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Rohese de Bardolf, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella de Newmarch в 1224 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь.
